devto_publish.description: Publish a markdown file as an article on Dev.to.

devto_list.description: List own published articles, or another user's articles.

devto_read.description: Read article body + metadata by ID, slug, or full URL.

devto_browse.description: Browse recent articles on a tag.

devto_comments.description: List comments on an article (flat tree, max N).

devto_react.description: React (like/unicorn/readinglist) to an article. Toggles on/off. Requires DEVTO_SESSION_COOKIE for Dev.to write actions (API key alone returns 401).

devto_comment.description: Post a comment (or reply with PARENT_COMMENT_ID). EXPERIMENTAL — requires DEVTO_SESSION_COOKIE; the public API has no comment-write endpoint.

devto_status_since.description: Briefing: new comments + top articles since timestamp. No arg = uses ~/.config/devto/last_check (auto-tracked). Fan-out: 1 call + 1 per recent article.
